description: Read Lobsters stories, tags, comments, and front-page/news feeds from public JSON endpoints.

tools.name: hottest-json_get-hottest-stories
tools.description: Get hottest stories. Returns array of Story.

tools.name: newest_get-stories
tools.description: Get newest stories. Required: page (default: 1). Returns array of Story.

tools.name: page_get-front
tools.description: Get front page stories. Required: page (default: 1). Returns array of Story.

tools.name: s_get-story
tools.description: Get story details and comments. Required: short_id. Returns the Story.

tools.name: t_get-tag-stories
tools.description: Get stories for a tag. Required: tag. Returns array of Story.
